top_signals.title: HSBC’s Kettner Sees Risk of Pullback in Stocks Before Midterms
top_signals.summary: Equity investors should look to reduce some exposure after this earnings season, according to HSBC Holdings Plc’s Max Kettner, who warns that stretched sentiment, a fading fiscal impulse, and US midterm election uncertainty could trigger a pullback.

top_signals.title: Treasury yields edge lower as investors map geopolitical risks
top_signals.summary: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — was broadly flat at 4.594%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Can he Healey the British economy?
top_signals.summary: Britain's new Prime Minister, Andy Burnham, names former Defense Secretary John Healey as Chancellor of the Exchequer in a suprise move.
